import json, codecs, os, sys, re, unicodedata, pandas as pd

quran_path = '/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json'
hadith_path = '/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json'
print(os.path.exists(quran_path), os.path.getsize(quran_path))

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
len(quran), type(quran)

def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = re.sub(r'[^\S\r\n]+', ' ', s)  # normalize spaces
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # normalize Arabic letters (e.g., alifs with hamza)
    # map hamza forms to bare alif
    alif_variants = dict.fromkeys(map(ord, 'أإآٱ'), ord('ا'))
    yah_variants = {ord('ى'): 'ي', ord('ئ'): 'ي', ord('ؤ'): 'و'}
    tehmarbuta = {ord('ة'): 'ه'}
    s = s.translate(alif_variants)
    s = s.translate(yah_variants)
    s = s.translate(tehmarbuta)
    # remove diacritics
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # punctuation removal
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

def search_quran(query):
    nq = normalize(query)
    results = []
    for v in quran:
        nt = normalize(v['ayah_text'])
        if all(tok in nt for tok in nq.split()):
            results.append(v)
    return results

query = "ولقد أرسلنا نوحا إلى قومه"
res = search_quran(query)
len(res), res[:3]

from collections import Counter

def token_f1(a, b):
    a_tokens = normalize(a).split()
    b_tokens = normalize(b).split()
    ca, cb = Counter(a_tokens), Counter(b_tokens)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if common == 0:
        return 0.0
    precision = common / len(a_tokens)
    recall = common / len(b_tokens)
    if precision + recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
    return f1, precision, recall, common, len(a_tokens), len(b_tokens), a_tokens, b_tokens

original_span = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِ فَلَبِثَ فِيهِمْ أَرْبَعِينَ سِنَةً فَلَمّا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ عِبَادِيَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلّا اللَّهُ فَاتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِعُونِ ۖ يَأْوَا الْخَطَايَا وَجُزُوعُ الرِزْقِ"
candidate = [v for v in quran if v['surah_id']==29 and v['ayah_id']==14][0]['ayah_text']
token_f1(original_span, candidate)

cands = [(11,25),(23,23),(29,14)]
for s,a in cands:
    v = [x for x in quran if x['surah_id']==s and x['ayah_id']==a][0]
    f1 = token_f1(original_span, v['ayah_text'])
    print((s,a), f1[0], v['ayah_text'])
